bounded_scope: Add protected-record submission detail/readback access auditing for /api/submissions/:id without direct Figma work.
changes: Added GET /api/submissions/:id for protected submission and evidence metadata readback.
The route audits missing-session reads as submission_detail_unauthorized.
The route audits student-other and misc-admin broad access denials as submission_detail_denied with redacted actor role scopes.
The route audits allowed student-own, assigned mentor, scoped program-teacher, and admin readback as submission_detail_viewed with redacted actor role scopes.
The response returns storageIdentifiersRedacted=true and excludes raw Drive file IDs or storage identifier fields.
tests/review-loop.integration.test.mjs covers 401/403/200 access outcomes plus storage-ID redaction.
tests/production-workflow-source.test.mjs locks the route markers, and production route inventory includes /api/submissions/:id.

validation.result: passed; 8/8 review-loop, submission detail, submission submit, queue, history, and decision access tests
passed; production route inventory is up to date
passed; 181 passing tests and 4 expected opt-in skips
passed; cadence, predeploy gate, production surfaces, route inventory, generated output, site options, static/live Cloudflare verification, and 181 passing tests / 4 expected opt-in skips

blockers.next_safe_action: Confirm service-account file-create permission/quota/Workspace policy for the configured root folder, then rerun npm run check:drive:live.
